title: Administrative Division
subtitle: Providing structured frontline personnel verifications and financial records processing.

serviceDetails.name: Issuance of Certification of Payslip and Index of Payments of City Government Personnel
serviceDetails.purpose: Certifications for employee requests of payslips and index of payments for loan applications, retirement, reconciliation, reference, travel, visa application, monitoring, court hearings and other purposes.
serviceDetails.office: Office of the City Accountant – Administrative Division

requirements: Photocopy of Valid ID with signature of requestor
Authorization Letter and claimant ID if requestor is not the employee

processingSteps.action: Generate certification of payslip and index of payments
